title: Lucky Duck's Fortune Cookies
description: Feel lucky and wiser from this fun snack!
body:
"Unlike other fortune cookie mods that totally exist (?), our Lucky Duck's Fortune Cookies™ are authentic and based on real fortunes from fortune cookies because the artist eats too much take-out!"


**VERY EARLY ALPHA**

Data-driven!

This is a fun and silly mod that we made after Goober had the Idea of it from just owning a million Fortune Cookie Fortunes.

The Idea is to just either find or craft the cookies and get a random Fortune that you can collect.
